chemistry_validity.status: external chemistry-validity backend on modular rollout candidates

docking_affinity.status: external docking backend on modular rollout candidates

pocket_compatibility.status: external pocket-compatibility backend on modular rollout candidates

chemistry_novelty_diversity.interpretation: Review chemistry novelty/diversity on `reranked_candidates`; novelty is measured against training-reference structural signatures instead of relying only on within-layer uniqueness.

benchmark_evidence.stronger_benchmark_note: This surface stays at local benchmark-style chemistry evidence because the stronger reviewer gate is only 0.833 supported; it requires parseable, finite-conformer, sanitized, and unique-SMILES backend quality plus at least 8 review-layer candidates and novelty_diversity_score >= 0.75.
benchmark_evidence.interpretation: Combines backend-measured sanitization and unique-SMILES chemistry quality with held-out-pocket novelty/diversity aggregates (validity_quality_score=1.0000, novelty_diversity_score=1.0000) for a local benchmark-style chemistry summary.

prerequisites: Use the canonical experiment config that enables the external chemistry, docking, and pocket backends.
Ensure `python3` can execute `tools/rdkit_validity_backend.py` and `tools/pocket_contact_backend.py` from the repository root.
Keep source protein and ligand structure provenance available in the configured dataset so backend scoring does not degrade into missing-structure examples.

chemistry_backend.status: external chemistry-validity backend on modular rollout candidates

docking_backend.status: external docking backend on modular rollout candidates

pocket_backend.status: external pocket-compatibility backend on modular rollout candidates

reranker_report.decision: bounded calibrated reranking is sufficient to keep adversarial training out of the mainline for this surface; confirm coefficients on larger backend-scored held-out pockets

reviewer_reasons: worst reviewed leakage regression 0.0641 exceeds the allowed delta 0.0300
leakage_calibration.decision: 6 reviewed variant(s) regress pocket fit or chemistry; base leakage remains bounded, so keep claim wording cautious and cite the ablation deltas explicitly

baseline_comparisons.label: heuristic_raw_rollout_no_repair
baseline_comparisons.interpretation: Raw decoder rollout before geometry repair, bond inference, or reranking.

baseline_comparisons.label: pocket_centroid_repair_proxy
baseline_comparisons.interpretation: Geometry-repaired candidates expose how much pocket-centroid postprocessing helps.

baseline_comparisons.label: deterministic_proxy_reranker
baseline_comparisons.interpretation: Current deterministic selection proxy before learned reranker calibration.

baseline_comparisons.label: calibrated_reranker
baseline_comparisons.interpretation: Active bounded calibrated reranker used on the claim-bearing selection path.

baseline_comparisons.label: objective_surrogate
baseline_comparisons.interpretation: Surrogate reconstruction objective control.

baseline_comparisons.label: disable_slots
baseline_comparisons.interpretation: No-slot controlled-interaction control.

baseline_comparisons.label: disable_rollout_pocket_guidance
baseline_comparisons.interpretation: No rollout-time pocket-guidance control.

baseline_comparisons.label: disable_cross_attention
baseline_comparisons.interpretation: No cross-modal interaction control, not a replacement architecture.

aggregate_interaction_review.recommendation: interaction tuning is still active, but the tuned Transformer path now has the broader reviewed metric lead; require one more clean surface refresh before escalating claim scope
